name: RPlog_Trouble_on_Cloud_City_Part_One
title: Trouble on Cloud City, Part One: An Uneasy Reunion
summary: In Johanna's still-unfinished Bespin club, the Jedi Jessalyn arrives with the CSA noble Basca Starker, who charms her with talk of cloud-surfing on his homeworld. Their host Johanna--Jessalyn's sister-in-law and best friend--greets the pair warmly but reserves a pointed coolness for Basca, whose attentiveness toward Jessalyn unsettles her. As the Zeltron performer Quinne flits about preparing the venue for its grand reopening, the conversation turns to family, brandy, and Jessalyn's children. When Basca lightly suggests Jessalyn's children might one day visit his keep on Caspar, Johanna--haunted by a desert Seer's prophecy that those she loves will be devoured by the darkness she senses within him--reacts with a quietly chilling refusal, her composure cracking. The reunion ends with Jessalyn moving worriedly to her friend's side, silently pleading for her trust.
